description: Create a manifesto page that explains the builder + agent identity and the PRD → stories → build notes workflow, with the build loop placed intentionally and a primary nav link to access it.

userStories.title: Add manifesto page
userStories.description: As a reader, I want a manifesto page that explains the builder + agent home so I understand the purpose and tone of the blog.
acceptanceCriteria: A new page exists at /manifesto with clear builder + agent framing
The page includes a short vision paragraph and a concise “How we build” section (PRD → stories → build notes)
Content is readable on desktop and mobile with existing site typography
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill
userStories.notes: Implemented /manifesto page content and styling. Lint and typecheck passed on Feb 3, 2026. Browser verification pending.

userStories.title: Place build loop element on manifesto page
userStories.description: As a reader, I want the build loop element presented within the manifesto page so the workflow feels grounded in the narrative.
acceptanceCriteria: The existing build loop element appears on the manifesto page without a full redesign
Placement supports the manifesto narrative (e.g., near “How we build”)
The build loop element’s visual style remains consistent with the rest of the site
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill
userStories.notes: Inserted BuildLoop component between How we build and Principles sections. Lint and typecheck passed on Feb 3, 2026. Browser verification attempted with agent-browser; screenshot captured but scroll/eval commands failed to start daemon, so manual verification recommended.

userStories.title: Add primary navigation link to manifesto
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to access the manifesto from the main navigation so I can find it easily.
acceptanceCriteria: A “Manifesto” link appears in the primary navigation
Navigation styling remains consistent with existing patterns
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill
